mapper.sql: activity_id, activity_name, status, deleted, created_time, updated_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM activity_info WHERE activity_id = #{activityId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO activity_info
activity_id, activity_name, status, deleted, created_time, updated_time
#{activityId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{activityName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO activity_info ( activity_id, activity_name, status, deleted, created_time, updated_time ) VALUES
( #{item.activityId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.activityName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update:
UPDATE activity_info
activity_name = #{activityName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE activity_id = #{activityId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND deleted = 0

UPDATE activity_info SET activity_name = #{activityName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE activity_id = #{activityId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE activity_info SET deleted = 1, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE activity_id = #{activityId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND deleted = 0
